payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current employment fact. Preserve 'Sam left Goldman' as historical and update current employment to 'Sam works at Point72.' Do not keep 'Sam works at Goldman' as current.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: No entity ambiguity indicated; 'Sam' refers to the same person across the existing and new facts.

details: Detected direct conflict with an existing current employment fact.
Classified the new input as a transition that supersedes prior current employment.
Produced separate historical and current memory cards to avoid presenting superseded information as current.

repair_options: Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current/historical.
Store the departure from Goldman as a historical employment transition.
Store 'Sam works at Point72' as the new current employment fact.
